name: rldyour-flow
description: Автономный SDLC-воркфлоу для Claude Code: ry-init, ry-start, ry-newp, ry-review, ry-deploy + 6 reviewer subagents (architecture/quality/consistency/integration/verification/security) + flow-post-task-sync + instruction-docs-sync. SessionStart/PostToolUse/Stop хуки advisory + non-blocking. Fullrepo branch для agent-only файлов.
